description: Machine-readable mutation lane definitions from GODELOS_REPO_IMPLEMENTATION_CHARTER §10.

0.name: report
0.title: Report generation
0.purpose: Generate architecture packets, refresh inventories, update risk docs.

1.name: hygiene
1.title: Hygiene
1.purpose: Remove marked debug prints, eliminate dead local noise, simplify obvious internal clutter.
hard_constraints: no semantics change unless trivial and provable

2.name: parse_errors
2.title: Parse repair
2.purpose: Repair syntax errors, restore parsability, unblock analysis and test execution.
hard_constraints: if intent is unclear, prefer minimal repair plus note

3.name: import_cycles
3.title: Circular dependency elimination
3.purpose: Break import cycles by structural means.
hard_constraints: do not merely hide the cycle

4.name: entrypoint_consolidation
4.title: Entrypoint consolidation
4.purpose: Reduce runtime duplication, delegate launchers to canonical runtime root.
hard_constraints: no breaking of demos or scripts without wrapper preservation

5.name: contract_repair
5.title: Contract repair
5.purpose: Normalise interfaces, repair adapter mismatches, align implementations with substrate boundaries.

6.name: runtime_extraction
6.title: Runtime extraction
6.purpose: Move orchestration logic out of scripts or ad hoc files into runtime modules.

7.name: agent_boundary
7.title: Agent boundary enforcement
7.purpose: Isolate agent internal state, replace direct cross-module reach-through with messages or interfaces.

8.name: knowledge_normalisation
8.title: Knowledge substrate normalisation
8.purpose: Centralise persistent knowledge access, remove direct concrete-store entanglement.

9.name: consciousness_instrumentation
9.title: Consciousness instrumentation
9.purpose: Add metrics, traces, validation hooks, and introspection paths relevant to recursive self-awareness research.
hard_constraints: instrumentation must remain evidence-oriented, not rhetorical

validation_floor.description: Any self-modifying mutation must at minimum satisfy (§9.3)
requirements: repository compiles or targeted files compile where relevant
changed tests pass, or a clear debt note explains why not
the PR explains the lane and intended convergence effect

mutation_budget_policy.description: Autonomous changes must be thin and rapid, but never indiscriminate (§11).
